title: FunTime Charlie the Caterpillar Pull Along Toy, Spinning Balls, Motor Skills Development, 12+ Months
features: DEVELOPMENTAL TOY: Pull-along caterpillar design with spinning balls helps develop fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination in young children
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specifically designed for children aged 12 months and above, offering safe and engaging play experiences
INTERACTIVE FEATURES: Colourful spinning balls in blue, green, red, and purple create engaging visual and tactile stimulation
MOBILITY DESIGN: Pull-string mechanism allows toddlers to easily drag the toy along, encouraging walking and active play
ENGAGING ELEMENTS: Cheerful caterpillar character with bright colours and spinning action keeps little ones entertained while learning
description: Product Description Introduce your little one to the delightful world of play with Charlie the Caterpillar, an engaging pull-along toy designed for children 12 months and older. This charming caterpillar features a friendly yellow head with adorable antennae and a cheerful expression, followed by colourful spinning balls that create a mesmerising effect as your child pulls it along. The vibrant combination of blue, green, red, and purple wheels, paired with multicoloured balls, makes this toy visually stimulating for young minds. Each wheel is thoughtfully designed with easy-spin mechanisms that help develop your child's motor skills through play. The pull-along string allows toddlers to take Charlie on adventures around the house, encouraging walking and coordination. Perfect for early developmental stages, this toy combines physical activity with sensory engagement as the balls spin and rotate. The sturdy construction and smooth-rolling wheels ensure hours of entertainment while supporting your child's growing mobility and confidence in walking. Box Contains Funtime; Fun Time; Charlie the Caterpillar; Caterpillar; Activity; Pull Along; Pull; 12 months+
